G0.label:
Φ : Type
inst✝ : DecidableEq Φ
l r : List Φ
Γ✝ Δ✝ Γ : List (Form Φ)
φ ψ : Form Φ
Δ : List (Form Φ)
h : Cal l r (φ :: Γ) (ψ :: Δ)
ih : Proof' l r (φ :: Γ) (ψ :: Δ)
⊢ Proof' l r Γ (φ ⇒ ψ :: Δ)

G1.label:

ih : Proof' l r (φ :: Γ) (ψ :: Δ)

G2.label:
case a
Φ : Type
inst : DecidableEq Φ
l r : List Φ
Γ_1 Δ_1 Γ : List (Form Φ)
φ ψ : Form Φ
Δ : List (Form Φ)
h : Cal l r (φ :: Γ) (ψ :: Δ)
ih : Proof (φ :: (Γ ++ List.map (fun x => ♩x) l)) (ψ :: (Δ ++ List.map (fun x => ♩x) r))
⊢ Proof (φ :: (Γ ++ List.map (fun x => ♩x) l)) (ψ :: (Δ ++ List.map (fun x => ♩x) r))

G3.label:
case a

Γ_1 Δ_1 Γ : List (Form Φ)

ih : Proof (φ :: (Γ ++ List.map (fun x => ♩x) l)) (ψ :: (Δ ++ List.map (fun x => ♩x) r))
⊢ Proof ?Γ (φ ⇒ ψ :: (Δ ++ List.map (fun x => ♩x) r))

G6.label:
case a
Φ : Type
inst : DecidableEq Φ
l r : List Φ
Γ_1 Δ_1 Γ : List (Form Φ)
φ ψ : Form Φ
Δ : List (Form Φ)
h : Cal l r (φ :: Γ) (ψ :: Δ)
ih : Proof (φ :: (Γ ++ List.map (fun x => ♩x) l)) (ψ :: (Δ ++ List.map (fun x => ♩x) r))
